title: Unique Blue Standing Number 9 Foil Balloon 30", Packaged
features: 1 Giant Blue Number 9 Shaped Standing Balloon
Number balloon measures 76 cm when fully inflated (ships flat)
Inflate with air only, DO NOT use with helium
Ideal for a 9th birthday party, or combined with other number balloons for any age
Combine with other blue party supplies from Unique Party
description: From the manufacturer Giant Royal Blue 34" Foil Number Balloons Let everyone know the milestone that's being celebrated with these Giant Foil Number Standing Balloons! These number balloons will make a dazzling addition to any birthday, graduation, engagement, new years or anniversary party! Simply fill them with air and create an eye-catching centrepiece!
